title: Add coupling and failure semantics to stable relations
goal: Classify operationally relevant Systemkatalog relations by coupling, failure policy, authority direction and optional recovery edge.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Only stable authority- or failure-relevant relations receive resilience fields.
Relations distinguish synchronous blocking, durable asynchronous, lossy asynchronous, observational and manual coupling.
Relations declare block, queue, degrade, fallback or ignore behavior and preserve authority direction.
Validators reject invalid authority reversal, fallback cycles and unsupported recovery references.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
